tasks.name: Create kanban-summary.loader.ts with parallel task queries
tasks.purpose: Fetch current 'doing' task and next highest-priority 'do' task in parallel for dashboard display

constraints: Use Promise.all for parallel queries
Query status='doing' LIMIT 1 for current task
Query status='do' ORDER BY priority DESC LIMIT 1 for next task
Add 'server-only' import at top

patterns.description: React.cache wrapper pattern and Promise.all parallel fetching

tasks.input_state: Tasks table exists with status and priority columns; no loader exists yet
tasks.output_state: Loader function exported and cached, returns { currentTask, nextTask } with null for missing tasks
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader exports cached function that returns object with currentTask (status='doing') and nextTask (status='do', highest priority)
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q "export const loadKanbanSummary = cache" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/kanban-summary.loader.ts

outputs.description: Server-side data loader with parallel queries

tasks.name: Create KanbanSummaryCard server component
tasks.purpose: Display current and next tasks in dashboard card format with visual hierarchy

dependencies: Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardFooter from @kit/ui/card
constraints: Server component (async function)
Call loadKanbanSummary() to fetch data
Current task highlighted with primary background
Priority badge with color coding: low=gray, medium=blue, high=red
Link to /home/[account]/kanban in footer
Show KanbanSummaryEmpty if both tasks are null
Task description with line-clamp-2 CSS class

patterns.description: Card component structure and styling patterns

tasks.input_state: Loader function exists and returns task data
tasks.output_state: Server component renders card with current task (highlighted), next task, priority badges, and link to kanban board
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders async, calls loader, displays tasks with priority badges, shows empty state when no tasks
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "export async function KanbanSummaryCard" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/kanban-summary-card.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create KanbanSummaryEmpty component
tasks.purpose: Show friendly empty state with call-to-action when user has no tasks

constraints: Display empty state message with i18n key 'common:kanbanSummary.emptyState'
Include button linking to /home/[account]/kanban with text 'common:kanbanSummary.createFirstTask'
Use Card component for consistent styling

tasks.input_state: No tasks exist for user (currentTask and nextTask are null)
tasks.output_state: Empty state component displayed with message and CTA button
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders card with empty message and link to create first task

tasks.name: Add kanban summary i18n translations
tasks.purpose: Provide translated text for kanban summary card, empty state, and actions

constraints: Add kanbanSummary object with keys: cardTitle, currentTask, nextTask, emptyState, createFirstTask, viewAllTasks
Follow existing JSON structure in common.json
Use sentence case for labels

tasks.output_state: common.json contains kanbanSummary translations for all card text

tasks.name: Wire KanbanSummaryCard into dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Integrate kanban summary card into main dashboard with Suspense boundary

constraints: Import KanbanSummaryCard
Wrap in Suspense with fallback skeleton (optional - can use basic loading state)
Add to PageBody section
Maintain existing page structure

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists with empty PageBody; KanbanSummaryCard component is ready
tasks.output_state: Dashboard renders KanbanSummaryCard within PageBody with Suspense
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard page imports and renders KanbanSummaryCard component

tasks.name: Test kanban summary card rendering
tasks.purpose: Verify card renders correctly with tasks, without tasks, and with different priorities

dependencies: Supabase local instance with tasks table
constraints: Test with no tasks (empty state shown)
Test with doing task only
Test with do task only
Test with both tasks (full card display)
Test priority badge colors (low=gray, medium=blue, high=red)
Test link to kanban board works
Verify typecheck passes

tasks.input_state: Card integrated into dashboard; Supabase running locally
tasks.output_state: All rendering states verified working; typecheck passes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Manual test confirms: empty state works, tasks display with correct priority colors, link navigates to kanban board, typecheck passes
